# App Store Keyword Research (2026 Step-by-Step) | ScreenMagic

## Summary
Data-driven keyword research guide for iOS App Store optimization in 2026. Quantifies keyword field mechanics, provides title pattern examples from top-ranked apps (Notion, Cal AI, Linear), and establishes the keyword-to-screenshot alignment discipline. Published January 2026.

## Key quotations / statistics
- "Apple does not publish ranking factor weights, but multiple independent studies in 2025 and 2026 (AppTweak, Sensor Tower, AppFollow) consistently estimate that keyword presence in title, subtitle and the 100 character field accounts for 55 to 65% of organic ranking signal. The remaining 35 to 45% splits across install velocity, conversion rate, retention and review metrics."
- "Spend more time on keyword research than on screenshot design. A perfect screenshot for the wrong keyword target wastes 100% of the impressions it earns."
- **Title pattern that works in 2026:** "Brand, primary keyword, secondary keyword." Examples: "Notion — notes, docs, AI", "Cal AI — Calorie Counter", "Linear — issue tracker for teams."
- "The keyword field is 100 characters, comma-separated, no spaces. Use commas only, never quoted phrases, Apple parses commas as separators."
- "The subtitle carries roughly half the weight of the title. Place a benefit-focused phrase that includes one or two more target keywords."
- **Screenshot-keyword alignment rule:** "Audit your top 5 ranking keywords against your first three screenshots. The first screenshot should reinforce the most important keyword target with a headline that uses related vocabulary."
- "Keywords still drive roughly 60% of organic App Store discovery in 2026."
- "The 100 character keyword field is per-locale, treat it as 7 fields not 1."
- "Refresh keywords every 30 days, ranking volatility punishes static listings."

## Annotations for stinger-forge
- The 55–65% keyword ranking signal estimate from three independent analytics platforms is the strongest quantitative basis for the keyword-first ASO strategy recommendation in `guides/01-aso-strategy.md`.
- The per-locale keyword field insight ("treat it as 7 fields not 1") is a high-leverage localization tactic that most small teams miss.
- The title pattern examples (Notion, Cal AI, Linear) are real 2026 examples stinger-forge can cite to make the guide concrete.
- The 30-day keyword refresh cadence should be the default recommendation; monthly maintenance is the minimum viable ASO practice.
